allow: Bash(node -e "const d = new Date\(Date.now\(\) + 30*60*1000\); const pad = n => String\(n\).padStart\(2,'0'\); const off = -d.getTimezoneOffset\(\); const oh = pad\(Math.floor\(Math.abs\(off\)/60\)\); const om = pad\(Math.abs\(off\)%60\); const sign = off >= 0 ? '+' : '-'; console.log\(d.getFullYear\(\)+'-'+pad\(d.getMonth\(\)+1\)+'-'+pad\(d.getDate\(\)\)+'T'+pad\(d.getHours\(\)\)+':'+pad\(d.getMinutes\(\)\)+':'+pad\(d.getSeconds\(\)\)+sign+oh+':'+om\);")
